context: From the Hindi film "Dushman" (1998). Lyrics by Anand Bakshi, music by Uttam Singh. Most iconically performed by Jagjit Singh, with a version also by Lata Mangeshkar. While a film song about separation, it has become a deeply spiritual piece widely sung at memorial gatherings and prayer meetings — expressing the soul's longing for the departed.

verses.hindi:
चिट्ठी न कोई संदेश, जाने वो कौन सा देश

                        जहाँ तुम चले गए
verses.transliteration:
Chitthi na koi sandesh, jaane wo kaun sa desh
Jahan tum chale gaye
verses.translation:
No letter, no message, who knows what land that is
where you have gone away.

verses.hindi:
आँखों में रह गई जो बात,

                        दिल में रह गई जो बात

                        ये सोच के हर रात

                        जिया जलता है
verses.transliteration:
Aankhon mein reh gayi jo baat,
Dil mein reh gayi jo baat
Ye soch ke har raat
Jiya jalta hai
verses.translation:
The words that remained unsaid in my eyes,
the feelings that remained in my heart ,
thinking of these every night,
my soul burns.

verses.hindi:
बीत गई कितनी ही बहारें

                        रात गई फिर दिन भी गुज़ारें

                        दर पे तेरे ये हारे

                        खड़े रहते हैं
verses.transliteration:
Beet gayi kitni hi bahaaren
Raat gayi phir din bhi guzaaren
Dar pe tere ye haare
Khade rehte hain
verses.translation:
How many springs have passed,
nights go by, then days are endured too.
Defeated, at your doorstep,
I keep standing.

verses.hindi:
काटे हैं अब ये दिन ऐसे

                        बादल में चाँद छुपे जैसे

                        ढल जाए उम्र फिर भी

                        जियेंगे ऐसे
verses.transliteration:
Kaate hain ab ye din aise
Baadal mein chaand chhupe jaise
Dhal jaaye umr phir bhi
Jiyenge aise
verses.translation:
I pass these days now
like the moon hidden behind clouds.
Even if a lifetime passes,
I will go on living like this.

verses.hindi:
जाने वो कौन सा देश

                        जहाँ तुम चले गए
verses.transliteration:
Jaane wo kaun sa desh
Jahan tum chale gaye
verses.translation:
Who knows what land that is
where you have gone away.
